mapper.sql: id, project_id, dataset, variable, where_clause, label, data_type, length, significant_digits, format, mandatory, assigned_value, codelist, controlled_terms_or_format, origin, source, pages, derivation_comment, method, predecessor, comment, developer_notes, category, sort_order, created_time, updated_time, created_by, updated_by
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sas_vlm_data ( project_id, username, dataset, variable, where_clause, label, data_type, length, significant_digits, format, mandatory, assigned_value, codelist, controlled_terms_or_format, origin, source, pages, derivation_comment, method, predecessor, comment, developer_notes, category, sort_order, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{username}, #{dataset}, #{variable}, #{whereClause}, #{label}, #{dataType}, #{length}, #{significantDigits}, #{format}, #{mandatory}, #{assignedValue}, #{codelist}, #{controlledTermsOrFormat}, #{origin}, #{source}, #{pages}, #{derivationComment}, #{method}, #{predecessor}, #{comment}, #{developerNotes}, #{category}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sas_vlm_data SET dataset = #{dataset}, variable = #{variable}, where_clause = #{whereClause}, label = #{label}, data_type = #{dataType}, length = #{length}, significant_digits = #{significantDigits}, format = #{format}, mandatory = #{mandatory}, assigned_value = #{assignedValue}, codelist = #{codelist}, controlled_terms_or_format = #{controlledTermsOrFormat}, origin = #{origin}, source = #{source}, pages = #{pages}, derivation_comment = #{derivationComment}, method = #{method}, predecessor = #{predecessor}, comment = #{comment}, developer_notes = #{developerNotes}, category = #{category}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sas_vlm_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sas_vlm_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY dataset ASC, sort_order ASC

update.foreach: UPDATE sas_vlm_data SET sort_order = #{item.sortOrder} WHERE id = #{item.id}

mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT dataset FROM sas_vlm_data WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND username = #{username} ORDER BY dataset
